summary: Mobile PWA optimization testing complete. All features working correctly: mobile top header with hamburger/logo/notifications, bottom navigation with 5 tabs, FAB with 6 quick actions, 2-column KPIs on mobile, and zero desktop regression.

issues: Console hydration warnings about <span> inside <select>/<option>/<tr>/<td>/<th>/<tbody> - cosmetic issue from Emergent preview environment instrumentation, not actual code issues
Recharts warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor chart sizing issue on mobile

critical_code_review_comments: MobileBottomNav.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
CSS media queries at 767px correctly show/hide mobile vs desktop elements
The FAB quick actions overlay has good UX with backdrop blur and animation
Touch targets are adequate (FAB 52x52px, bottom nav buttons 60x43px)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA optimization complete. Key data-testids: mobile-bottom-nav, mobile-top-header, mobile-menu-toggle, fab-quick-actions, bottom-nav-inicio, bottom-nav-parcelas, bottom-nav-visitas, bottom-nav-tratam., bottom-nav-mas, quick-actions-overlay, quick-action-nueva-visita, etc.
